## Configuration

## Usage

Select products or templates then click on Merge products in Action
menu. Select Destination product in which need to merge all other
products Then click on Merge Product, it will merge all the products.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-warehouse/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-warehouse/issues/new?body=module:%20base_product_merge%0Aversion:%2017.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.
